news.t: Invesco small-cap ETFs clean up on Wednesday's short squeeze

holdings.infoBox: PSCD is an equity ETF with a total of 90 individual holdings. The top holdings are CarMax stock at 3.09%, Brinker International at 2.92%, Etsy, Inc. at 2.89%, LKQ Corporation at 2.81%, and Victoria's Secret & Co at 2.67%.

overview.description: The Invesco S&P SmallCap Consumer Discretionary ETF (PSCD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in consumer discretionary equity. The fund tracks a market-cap-weighted index of consumer discretionary firms selected from the S&P SmallCap 600. PSCD was launched on Apr 7, 2010 and is issued by Invesco.

data.title: Invesco small-cap ETFs clean up on Wednesday's short squeeze
data.text: A trio of small-cap exchange-traded funds from Invesco cruised higher Wednesday, boosted by frenzied buying of heavily-shorted stocks like GameStop Corp. , Bed Bath and Beyond , and Macy's . The Inves...
